chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD R.A. No.114 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA 1115/2021 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case 03.02.2025 Mr. Pir Bux Bhurgri Advocate for the Applicant. Mr. Abdul Ghafoor Hakro Advocate for the Respondent(s). Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto Assistant AG. -.-.-. The matter was heard to some extent and Counsel are required to satisfy the Court with respect to the following: 1. Whether a document can be declared as genuine or fictitious at the stage of hearing of an Application under Order 7 Rule 11 CPC? 2. Whether a case can be decided on the basis of evidence of a witness in some other case, especially at the stage of hearing of an Application under Order 7 Rule 11 CPC? 3. Whether a witness can be called for recording evidence and deciding the case, at the stage of hearing of an Application under Order 7 Rule 11 CPC? Counsel are directed to submit written synopsis with respect to their respective pleas on the next date. Adjourned to 07.03.2025. J U D G E
